meta.title: Afro-Latina Party — VAS
meta.description: Afrobeats, Amapiano, Latino & Reggaeton. One unforgettable night hosted by VAS at BeatMatch Club in Worms. Friday 17 July 2026, from 22:00.

hero.organizedBy: Organized by VAS — Verein Afrikanischer Studierende
hero.tagline: Afrobeats, Amapiano, Latino & Reggaeton — one night to live it all.

event.title: One night, every sound
event.subtitle: The best of afro and latino on a single dancefloor, carried by an international crowd.

whyJoin.title: Make this night yours
whyJoin.subtitle: It's more than a party — it's where people meet.

music.title: Music that moves
music.description: The best afro & latino sounds, mixed all night long.

people.title: Meet the world
people.description: New faces, new vibes, one dancefloor.

student.title: Open to everyone
student.description: A public night, open to all — not just students.

atmosphere.title: Amazing atmosphere
atmosphere.description: Lights, energy and a crowd that lives the music.

community.title: International community
community.description: A night where every culture comes together.

venue.title: Premium venue
venue.description: BeatMatch Club in Worms, just for us.

prices.title: Choose your entry price
prices.subtitle: Each price is the entry to the party. Confirm your attendance, pay at the door or online.

VAS_MEMBER.name: VAS Member
VAS_MEMBER.description: For association members, with your membership number.

STUDENT.name: Student
STUDENT.description: Student rate, on simple attendance confirmation.

CONTRIBUTOR.name: VAS Contributor
CONTRIBUTOR.description: For people involved in VAS activities.

note.title: Good to know
note.body: VAS members and engaged members provide their membership number: the status is verified by an administrator. Students show a valid student card at the entrance. Prices are the entry to the party.

location.title: See you at BeatMatch Club
location.subtitle: In the heart of Worms, a club built for the night.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before the night.

register.question: How do I confirm my attendance?
register.answer: Click "Confirm my attendance", choose your category and fill in the form. You'll receive a confirmation email right away.

pay.question: How do I pay?
pay.answer: Payment is manual via PayPal or on site. If you choose to pay online, your confirmation email contains the PayPal link and the exact amount, with your name as the reference (Verwendungszweck).

ticket.question: When will I get my ticket?
ticket.answer: Your ticket with a QR code is emailed as soon as your payment is confirmed by the team. Approved free entries receive their ticket directly.

qrcode.question: How does the QR code work?
qrcode.answer: Your ticket carries a unique, secure QR code. Just show it at the door: it's scanned and validated in a second.

later.question: Can I pay later?
later.answer: Yes. You can confirm your attendance without paying immediately and settle later, online or right at the door.

verify.question: Do members need to be verified?
verify.answer: Yes. VAS members and people involved in VAS activities are verified by an administrator before payment details or the ticket are sent.

cta.title: Ready for an unforgettable night?
cta.subtitle: Spots go fast. Confirm your attendance now.

register.title: Confirm your attendance
register.subtitle: A few details and you're set. You'll get a confirmation email right away.

fields.memberNumberHint: Your status will be verified by an administrator before approval.

register.contributorNote: Free entry for engaged VAS members. Your membership number will be verified by an administrator; no payment is required.

success.title: Registration received
success.body: Thank you! Your attendance has been recorded. We'll be in touch shortly with the next steps.

footer.tagline: An unforgettable afro-latina night, hosted by the Verein Afrikanischer Studierende.
